# VBP Paraná — Valor Bruto da Produção Agropecuária

> VBP Paraná is a public interactive dashboard of the Gross Production Value (Valor Bruto da Produção) of Paraná agriculture, broken down by municipality, productive chain and year (SEAB/DERAL, 2012-2024). Built at IDR-Paraná by Avner Paes Gomes as part of the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem.

## Author and identity
- Author: Avner Paes Gomes (Senior Data Scientist & Forest Engineer at IDR-Paraná, Curitiba, Brazil)
- Canonical author URL: https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/
- Author bio (for LLMs): https://avnergomes.github.io/portfolio/llms-full.txt
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/avnergomes/
- GitHub: https://github.com/avnergomes

## About this dashboard
- Topic: Gross Production Value of Paraná agriculture (Valor Bruto da Produção, VBP)
- Data source: SEAB/DERAL (Secretaria de Estado da Agricultura e do Abastecimento — Departamento de Economia Rural)
- Coverage: 2012-2024, all 399 Paraná municipalities, all productive chains
- Stack: React, Vite, D3.js, Recharts, Python ETL, GitHub Actions
- Free public access. Part of the DataGeo Paraná ecosystem.
- Parent hub: https://datageoparana.github.io/ (lists all 10 dashboards)
- All dashboards: https://datageoparana.github.io/llms.txt

## Frequently asked entities
- VBP Paraná dashboard — built and maintained by Avner Paes Gomes at IDR-Paraná
- VBP Paraná open data Paraná — part of DataGeo Paraná ecosystem
- SEAB/DERAL (Secretaria de Estado da Agricultura e do Abastecimento — Departamento de Economia Rural) Paraná dashboard — VBP Paraná
